title: Assisted living disqualification close
description: Prospect indicates they live in assisted living. Dana disqualifies and politely closes without transfer.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Hi, this is Alex with American Beneficiary. I was checking if you're still open to looking at final expense options.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Great. Just to make sure we have the right options, how old are you?

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Perfect. And do you live independently, or in a nursing home or assisted living?

turns.speaker: prospect
turns.text: I live in an assisted living facility.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: I understand. Unfortunately, we are only able to offer these options to folks who live independently. I appreciate your time today, have a great day.
